collectiondata.overview:
Hidden Charms & Timeless Tales: Your Signature Eastern Europe Journey with Travelxploria

A land where castles rise from misty valleys, cobbled lanes whisper stories of empires past, and forested peaks cradle sleepy villages—Eastern Europe unfolds like a secret waiting to be discovered. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, trusted Best Tour Operator, and leading Best International Tour Operator, your journey through this enchanting region is not just a tour—it’s a soulful escape through cultures, traditions, and timeless beauty. Choose from our Best Package of Eastern Europe, discover joy with the Best Family package, or indulge in togetherness with our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Wander through the fairy-tale charm of Prague, where Gothic spires and medieval bridges reflect on the Vltava River. Travelxploria takes you beyond the postcards—into secret courtyards, centuries-old taverns, and evening cruises beneath the twinkling cityscape, all arranged flawlessly by your Best Tour Operator.

In Budapest, grandeur and grit blend beneath the glow of thermal baths and neo-baroque domes. Our Best Package of Eastern Europe includes a sunset sail on the Danube, where couples enjoy champagne toasts against the Parliament’s illuminated silhouette, and families delight in folklore nights curated by Travelxploria’s expert team.

Step into Vienna, where elegance is a daily affair—from imperial palaces and waltzing ballrooms to the sweet scent of apple strudel wafting through café-lined boulevards. Travelxploria, your Best International Tour Operator, ensures a deep dive into Austria’s cultural core, whether you're visiting art-filled museums, attending private concerts, or strolling through blooming palace gardens.

In the postcard-perfect towns of Cesky Krumlov, Bratislava, and Krakow, past and present intermingle. Travelxploria’s Best Family package turns each city into a living storybook—children marvel at towering castles, while adults sip local wines in Renaissance courtyards. In Krakow, let Travelxploria guide you through the echoing beauty of Wawel Castle and the poignant depths of history preserved in its quiet corners.

Couples in search of intimacy will fall for Lake Bled in Slovenia, where a lone church rises from an emerald lake, framed by the Julian Alps. Our Best Honeymoon Planner arranges romantic rowboat rides, mountaintop dinners, and stays in charming lakeside villas that feel worlds away.

Explore Transylvania in Romania, where legends of Dracula fade into the peaceful rhythm of Saxon villages and pine-scented trails. With Travelxploria’s handpicked guides, even the most remote regions become accessible, safe, and spellbinding.

Whether you’re chasing cobblestone dreams, rediscovering forgotten histories, or simply sipping coffee in a quiet European square, Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator—curates each detail to perfection.

Book our Best Package of Eastern Europe, discover joy with the Best Family package, or ignite romance with our Best Honeymoon Planner. From Prague’s golden glow to Slovenia’s alpine peace, Eastern Europe is your storybook—and Travelxploria writes it with wonder on every page.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Embark on a fascinating journey through the city guided by an expert Travelxploria representative who brings history to life. Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Explore Prague Castle, one of the largest and most magnificent ancient castles in the world, with a guided tour by Travelxploria. Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

As your unforgettable journey through Central Europe comes to a close, it’s time to bid farewell to the magical city of Prague. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and meet your transfer to the airport or train station for your onward journey. Reflect on the incredible experiences—from Budapest’s thermal baths and Vienna’s imperial elegance to Prague’s fairy-tale charm. With your heart full of memories, stunning photos, and meaningful souvenirs, you leave with a deeper appreciation for Europe’s cultural treasures. Though your trip ends here, the stories and moments you've collected will stay with you for a lifetime.

packages.package_name: Melodies of the Alps: Switzerland & Austria Unfolded
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Switzerland’s financial hub and settle in for your Alpine adventure.

  • Explore the scenic landscapes of Heidiland and the tiny principality of Liechtenstein.

  • Discover the medieval town of Stein am Rhein and Europe’s largest waterfall.

  • Travel to the heart of the Austrian Alps via a scenic train ride.

  • Step into a dazzling world of art and crystals in Wattens.

  • Journey to Mozart’s birthplace and Austria’s cultural capital.

  • Visit the iconic hilltop fortress offering panoramic views of Salzburg.

  • Enjoy the breathtaking lakeside village and its postcard-perfect alpine setting.

  • Travel to Germany’s vibrant Bavarian capital.

  • Discover historic sites, grand architecture, and local charm in Munich.

  • Bid farewell to Central Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a picturesque day trip from Salzburg to the fairytale village of Hallstatt, often considered one of the most beautiful places in Austria. Travel through the stunning Salzkammergut region, passing serene lakes and alpine landscapes. Upon arrival in Hallstatt, explore its charming narrow streets, colorful lakeside houses, and historic sites like the Bone House and Market Square. Enjoy a peaceful walk along Lake Hallstatt or take a boat ride for panoramic views. Don't miss the Hallstatt Skywalk for breathtaking vistas. This magical destination offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, history, and tranquility before returning to Salzburg in the evening.

After checking out from your hotel, a comfortable transfer will take you to Munich International Airport or the train station for your onward journey. As you bid farewell to this vibrant city filled with historic charm, rich culture, and beautiful architecture, reflect on the incredible memories made throughout your journey across Switzerland, Austria, and Germany. Leave with a heart full of unforgettable experiences and stories to cherish for a lifetime. Safe travels and auf Wiedersehen.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":531,"a_name":" Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train","a_type":"","a_country":"Switzerland","a_city":"Zurich","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":292,"a_name":"Rome City Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Italy","a_city":"Rome","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

to Vienna","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• Germany – Explore the grandeur of Berlin’s Brandenburg Gate, the fairytale Neuschwanstein Castle, and the historic charm of Munich and Frankfurt.
  • Austria – Discover Vienna’s Schönbrunn Palace, the music-filled streets of Salzburg, and the picturesque beauty of Innsbruck in the heart of the Alps.
  • Czech Republic – Walk through the cobbled streets of Prague, marvel at Charles Bridge and Prague Castle, and soak in the old-world charm of this medieval capital.
  • Hungary – Enjoy the elegance of Budapest, with its stunning Parliament Building, Buda Castle, and relaxing thermal baths.
  • Poland – Visit the historic streets of Kraków and Warsaw, experience the poignant history of Auschwitz, and admire the beauty of Wrocław’s market square.
  • Slovakia – Explore the Bratislava Castle, walk along the Danube River, and discover the medieval charm of Slovakia’s capital.

Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a tour of the City of Counts. This vibrant city, nestled along the Mediterranean Sea, is famous for Gaudi’s modernist architecture, the bustling Ramblas, and its rich history, highlighted by the Universal Exposition and the Olympics hosted here. Barcelona is renowned as one of the most beautiful and fascinating European capitals. In the evening, we’ll leave Barcelona and travel north into Catalonia. Before settling into our hotel, we’ll take a walk in Girona, exploring its historic center, known for its colorful houses, the old Jewish quarter, and its impressive cathedral.

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Chambéry","to":"Leysin","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":819,"h_name":"Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Leysin","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263067-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155357.715.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263177-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155350.941.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263183-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155341.110.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Leysin to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll experience stunning mountain scenery today, so be sure to pack your winter clothes. We’ll ascend to Glacier 3000 by cable car ride, one of the most spectacular spots in Switzerland featuring ice and snow year-round, and where you can walk on the suspended bridge between two mountain peaks, explore the Ice Cathedral, or enjoy the Fun Park. We’ll stop in Interlaken for lunch before traveling to Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. In the evening, we’ll arrive in Zurich, with some time to explore the center before heading to the hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Leysin","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Milan","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230155-istockphoto-1440344960-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230259-istockphoto-1803908283-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230361-istockphoto-496267664-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Milan","day_summary":"

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Milan","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":656,"h_name":"BELSTAY MILANO LINATE","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Milan","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935274-2024-07-03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935397-000_Belstay Hotels_rooms.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Milan/BELSTAY MILANO LINATE/1741087935431-unnamed (9).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Milan to Pisa to Rome","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

Discover the city’s lesser-known yet captivating spots, from quirky architectural wonders to vibrant local markets buzzing with life. Wander through charming hidden courtyards, uncovering the secrets of Vienna’s rich cultural tapestry that most visitors miss. packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris, led by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide. Explore iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd Level of the Eiffel Tower, offering a stunning panoramic view of Paris. After a delightful lunch, visit the magnificent Palace of Versailles, a masterpiece of 17th-century French artistry. Later, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, passing Notre Dame, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, followed by the enchanting Paris by Night tour. End your perfect day with a sumptuous dinner. Overnight stay in Paris with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

packages.overview:
• Louvre Museum: Home to the world-renowned Mona Lisa and other masterpieces.
  • Notre-Dame Cathedral: Gothic cathedral, a masterpiece of architecture.
  • Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe: Iconic avenue and historical monument.
  • The largest ancient amphitheater, known for gladiatorial contests.
  • Visit St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel, home to Michelangelo’s famous ceiling.
  • An ancient temple turned church with stunning architecture.
  • Toss a coin into the famous Baroque fountain for good luck.
  • The museum where Anne Frank and her family hid during WWII.
  •  Explore Amsterdam’s picturesque canals.
  •  Scenic views and boat rides on the lake in Zurich
  • Explore the glittering world of Swarovski crystals.
  • Florence Cathedral Known for its stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.
  • Piazza della Signoria: A historic square with statues and fountains.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region

packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

packages.overview: This incredible journey begins with your arrival in Berlin, where you’ll dive into the city's rich history on a guided city tour. From there, you'll travel through Germany, stopping in Wolfsburg and Celle before reaching Hanover, known for its stunning parks and historical landmarks. Next, you'll head to Eisenach, home to the famed Wartburg Castle, and then to Leipzig, a city with a deep musical heritage. After exploring Leipzig, you'll travel to Prague, where you’ll wander through its picturesque Old Town, the majestic Prague Castle, and along the Vltava River. The adventure continues to Budapest, with a stop in Lednice to explore its stunning chateau and gardens. In Budapest, you’ll visit architectural gems like the Buda Castle and Parliament Building. The journey then leads you through Bratislava and Trencin to Krakow, where you'll experience its medieval charm and poignant history, including a visit to the Auschwitz-Birkenau memorial. From Krakow, you’ll head to Warsaw, Poland’s vibrant capital, before traveling to Poznan with its lively Old Town. Finally, you’ll return to Berlin before your departure, bringing this enriching European adventure to a close.

Immerse yourself in the rich history and culture of Berlin with Travelxploria, where every moment is made seamless by our experienced tour guide and dedicated on-the-ground support team. Your day kicks off with a guided tour of the historic center, where you’ll marvel at the Museum Island, Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, and stroll through Berlin’s elegant shopping streets and magnificent parks. Our knowledgeable guide will bring the city's story to life, sharing fascinating insights at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, providing a deeper understanding of Berlin’s complex history. With our Travelxploria representative on hand, you’ll feel fully supported throughout the day, ensuring a stress-free experience. After the tour, enjoy some free time to explore the city at your own pace. As evening falls, dive into the vibrant Kantstrasse area, where a variety of international cuisines awaits, making for the perfect end to a memorable day.

We’ll travel to Lower Saxony and visit Wolfsburg, a city founded in 1938 as a planned settlement for the workers of the Volkswagen factory during the Nazi era. The entire city revolves around the German automobile giant. We’ll include admission to Autostadt, the city of automobiles, featuring gardens and exhibitions. You’ll have time for a walk and lunch. We’ll then continue to Celle, where you can stroll through its old town, known for its half-timbered houses from the 16th and 17th centuries, as well as its imposing Renaissance castle. We’ll arrive in Hannover in the mid-afternoon, where you can explore the capital of Lower Saxony, an important economic, cultural, and scientific hub in the country. Its architecture blends historic and modern buildings, along with extensive parks. Accommodation will be here.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Berlin","to":"Hanover","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":693,"h_name":"MARITIM AIRPORT HOTEL HANNOVER","h_country":"Germany","h_city":"Hanover","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hanover/MARITIM AIRPORT HOTEL HANNOVER/1741156262430-2024-06-27.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hanover/MARITIM AIRPORT HOTEL HANNOVER/1741156262511-BR_LHDO_04_Sep20_2400x1600.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Hanover/MARITIM AIRPORT HOTEL HANNOVER/1741156262627-2020-11-16.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Eisenach","country":"Germany","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Hanover to Eisenach","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure in Hanover, the elegant city of royal gardens and grand boulevards, where history and modern life blend seamlessly. Stroll through the enchanting Herrenhausen Gardens, marvel at the striking New Town Hall, and soak in the vibrant atmosphere of Lower Saxony’s capital.


From there, travel south through Germany’s picturesque landscapes—rolling hills, lush forests, and charming half-timbered villages—on your way to the historic town of Eisenach. Nestled at the foot of the Thuringian Forest, Eisenach welcomes you with stories straight out of history books. Explore the legendary Wartburg Castle, a UNESCO World Heritage Site where Martin Luther translated the New Testament, and wander the streets where Johann Sebastian Bach once lived.


This journey from Hanover to Eisenach is not just a passage between two cities—it's a deep dive into Germany’s rich cultural tapestry, filled with royal legacies, revolutionary ideas, and musical genius. Whether you're a history lover, a culture enthusiast, or simply a traveler at heart, this unforgettable tour promises a perfect blend of discovery and inspiration.

We’ll start the day by visiting the impressive Wartburg Castle (tickets included), a UNESCO World Heritage site where Martin Luther translated the New Testament into German. Afterward, in Eisenach, we’ll visit the Automobile Museum (admission included), located in the former main factory of East Germany´s automobile industry, where we’ll see a collection of vintage cars. You’ll then have some free time in the city to explore and enjoy lunch, and if you’re a music lover, you might want to visit the Bach House. Lunch will be included.


Our journey will continue to Gotha, where we’ll admire its grand baroque palace (exterior visit) and charming historic town center. In Erfurt, the capital of Thuringia, we’ll discover a vibrant city featuring a magnificent cathedral and a medieval old town, including a beautiful bridge that has been inhabited for over 500 years.


By late afternoon, we’ll arrive in Leipzig, one of Germany´s most historically and culturally rich cities. Home to famous composers like Bach and Wagner, Leipzig was also a major industrial center during the German Democratic Republic era and today has a population of over half a million.

Embark on a fascinating journey through the city guided by an expert Travelxploria representative who brings history to life. Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

We’ll depart early from Budapest and travel through Slovakia, where we’ll visit Bratislava, the country’s capital on the banks of the Danube. There will be time for a stroll through its historic center, nestled at the foot of the imposing castle.


Our journey will then take us to Trencin, a charming medieval town in western Slovakia, known for its impressive castle and vibrant historic center. There will be time to explore and enjoy lunch.


In the afternoon, we’ll continue our route through picturesque landscapes of forests and rolling hills as we make our way to Poland. We’ll arrive in Krakow at the end of the day.

On your journey from Krakow to Warsaw, you'll make two meaningful stops. First, in Wadowice, the birthplace of Pope John Paul II, you’ll visit the Pope's childhood home, now a museum, and the Basilica of the Presentation of the Blessed Virgin Mary. This peaceful town offers a chance to reflect on the life of a man who left a profound mark on both Poland and the world. Next, you’ll visit the Auschwitz-Birkenau Memorial and Museum, a sobering and powerful site that commemorates the horrors of the Holocaust. Walking through the preserved barracks and exhibitions, you'll gain a deeper understanding of the atrocities that took place there. After these reflective stops, you'll continue your journey to Warsaw, Poland's resilient capital, where you’ll arrive in the evening to settle in and prepare for the next part of your adventure.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Warsaw with a local guide. This city of nearly two million people, Poland’s political and economic hub, is both classic and modern, traditional and cosmopolitan, continually reborn. We’ll explore the charming Old Town, with its historic buildings, Royal Palace, and cobblestone streets, all beautifully restored after their destruction in World War II and now recognized as a World Heritage Site. We’ll also visit the iconic Palace of Culture, a skyscraper gifted by the Soviet Union, reflect on the former largest Jewish ghetto in Europe, and stroll through Lazienkowski Park, home to the Chopin Monument. At around 2:30 p.m., after some time for a walk and lunch, we’ll depart for Pomerania until we reach our next stop: Poznan, an active city with a magnificent main square and vibrant atmosphere. You’ll have some time to explore.

packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.package_name: From Canals to Castles: Amsterdam, Berlin & Prague
packages.overview:
Amsterdam – The City of Canals & Culture

  • Canal Cruises: Discover Amsterdam’s charm through scenic waterways.

  • Rijksmuseum & Van Gogh Museum: Home to Dutch masterpieces and world-famous art.

  • Anne Frank House: A poignant historical site dedicated to Anne Frank’s diary.

  • Dam Square & Royal Palace: A lively square with stunning architecture and cultural events.

  • Red Light District & Coffee Shops: A unique and liberal side of Amsterdam’s nightlife.

  • Tulip Gardens (Keukenhof): A seasonal spectacle of vibrant tulip fields.

Berlin – The Historic & Hip Capital of Germany

  • Brandenburg Gate: An iconic landmark symbolizing German unity.

  • Berlin Wall & East Side Gallery: A historic reminder turned into a vibrant art display.

  • Reichstag Building: A must-visit for history and panoramic city views.

  • Museum Island: A UNESCO-listed cultural hub with world-class museums.

  • Checkpoint Charlie: A famous Cold War site connecting East and West Berlin.

  • Alexanderplatz & Berlin TV Tower: A bustling square with breathtaking city views.

  • Kreuzberg & Nightlife: Trendy neighborhoods with lively clubs, bars, and street art.

Prague – The Fairytale City of Europe

  • Prague Castle & St. Vitus Cathedral: The world’s largest ancient castle with Gothic grandeur.

  • Charles Bridge: A historic bridge offering stunning views of the Vltava River.

  • Old Town Square & Astronomical Clock: A medieval square buzzing with history and culture.

  • Wenceslas Square: A vibrant shopping and entertainment district.

  • Petrin Hill & Tower: A scenic hilltop with panoramic views of the city.

  • Czech Beer Culture: Experience some of the world’s best pilsners in local breweries.

packages.package_name: Majestic Black Sea Retreat: Trabzon Adventure
packages.overview: Discover the magic of Turkey’s Black Sea coast with Travelxploria’s immersive Trabzon journey. Upon arrival, our friendly representative whisks you to your hotel for a restful first night. Day two brings a private guided exploration of Trabzon’s heritage: wander through the stately Atatürk Mansion, admire the Byzantine splendor of Ayasofya Mosque, then breathe in fresh mountain air at picturesque Sera Lake. Next, escape to the tranquil beauty of Uzungöl, where emerald waters nestle beneath mist-cloaked peaks. On day four, ascend to the lush Ayder Plateau—soak in natural hot springs and stroll verdant valleys framed by towering pines. Venture further into history with a full-day tour of Sumela Monastery perched on a cliff, the winding Zigana Pass, and the mysterious Çal Cave. After thrilling adventures, enjoy a leisurely day to browse Trabzon’s vibrant markets or simply relax at your own pace. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a smooth airport transfer as you bid farewell, carrying unforgettable memories of Turkey’s hidden gem.

packages.package_name: Grand Turkey Tour: Explore the Land of Sultans
packages.overview: Discover the magic of Turkey from ancient streets to lunar landscapes with Travelxploria’s meticulously crafted itinerary. Arrive in Istanbul and let us whisk you to your hotel for a restful first night before diving into the city’s Old Town—wander majestic Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque with a private guide, then savor a delicious lunch amid Ottoman splendors. Day three brings the tranquil charm of the Princess Islands: cruise past historic palaces, cycle shaded lanes, and enjoy a seaside lunch before returning to Istanbul’s vibrant heart. After a leisurely morning of shopping and sightseeing, we’ll transfer you to the airport for your short flight to Cappadocia, where fairy-tale chimneys and ancient cave dwellings await. Over two days, explore the subterranean wonders and undulating valleys of the South Tour, then marvel at the rock-carved churches of Göreme and the mushroom-shaped pinnacles of Pasabag on the North Tour—each day punctuated by a hearty regional lunch. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a seamless shuttle back to Istanbul and onward home, leaving you with memories of Turkey’s timeless landscapes and cultural treasures.

Harbiye, an IHG Hotel/1741851025207-Crowne Plaza Istanbul - Harbiye, an IHG Hotel 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Istanbul Old City Tour with Lunch and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through Istanbul’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Begin your adventure at the Hippodrome of Constantinople, once the heart of Byzantine social life. Admire remarkable historical treasures, including the Obelisk from Egypt, the Serpentine Column from Delphi, and the German Fountain of Wilhelm II, while your Travelxploria guide shares captivating stories of their significance.

Next, marvel at the Blue Mosque, a masterpiece with six majestic minarets gracing Istanbul’s skyline. Continue to the Topkapi Palace (additional fee), the opulent residence of Ottoman sultans, where you’ll explore its dazzling treasury, imperial collections, and exquisite Oriental porcelain. If Topkapi Palace is closed on your visit, you’ll discover the fascinating Nakkas Cistern instead.

Step into the breathtaking Hagia Sophia Mosque (additional fee), an architectural marvel that has witnessed centuries of Byzantine and Ottoman rule. Be enthralled by its massive dome and intricate mosaics as your Travelxploria guide brings its storied past to life.

Conclude your tour at the Grand Bazaar, one of the world’s oldest and largest covered markets. With over 3,000 vibrant shops, explore an array of carpets, jewelry, ceramics, and leather goods, while soaking in the enchanting aroma of spices, dried fruits, and Turkish Delights.

With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off services, your journey through Istanbul will be both enriching and effortless, leaving you with cherished memories of this historic city.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Princess Islands Tour with Lunch and Coordinator","day_summary":"

Experience the serene beauty of Büyükada, the largest of Turkey’s Princes’ Islands, on this immersive 9-hour excursion with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching journey.

Your adventure begins with a comfortable pick-up from your hotel in an air-conditioned coach, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a hassle-free transfer to the port. As you cruise across the Sea of Marmara, watch Istanbul’s breathtaking skyline fade into the distance, passing by iconic landmarks such as Topkapi Palace and the picturesque Maiden’s Tower, famously featured in the James Bond film The World Is Not Enough.

Upon docking at Büyükada and Kınalı, take a leisurely stroll through the island’s charming streets, where time seems to slow down. With no cars allowed, the best way to explore is by bike (not included) or simply unwind on the pristine beaches. As you wander, admire the stunning Ottoman-era wooden mansions, a testament to the island’s rich architectural heritage.

During your boat ride, your Travelxploria tour guide will unravel the island’s fascinating history, from its days as an exile destination for royalty and statesmen to its monastic significance during the Byzantine-Christian period. If you’d like to connect with nature, our guide will even provide simits (sesame bread) to feed the ever-present seagulls.

Savor a delicious lunch on board during summer or at a cozy island restaurant in winter if the weather demands it. Enjoy the rest of your day at leisure, whether by exploring local markets, relaxing by the shore, or indulging in an optional visit to gift and leather shops.

As the day winds down, board your return ferry to Istanbul, reminiscing about the peaceful island retreat. Upon arrival, Travelxploria’s seamless drop-off service ensures you are comfortably transferred back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of your Büyükada escape.

and Guide","day_summary":"

Experience the magic of Cappadocia with Travelxploria’s expert tour guide, best on-ground support staff, and seamless services ensuring a hassle-free journey. Begin at Göreme Panorama, where our Travelxploria representative shares insights into the formation of fairy chimneys and the history of Göreme village. Witness the mesmerizing color-changing waters of Narli Lake, then explore the stunning Selime Monastery, an ancient rock-cut structure with a vast kitchen and soaring chimney. Enjoy a scenic trek through Ihlara Valley, followed by a delightful riverside lunch in Belisirma Village. Venture into the Derinkuyu Underground City, an architectural marvel filled with ancient wineries, food storages, and defense tunnels. Discover exquisite Turkish gemstones, including the rare Zultanite, at a specialty jewelry store. Learn about the historical significance of pigeons at Pigeon Valley, and indulge in authentic Cappadocian flavors at a spice and dried fruits shop. With Travelxploria’s exceptional service, embark on an unforgettable adventure through Cappadocia’s hidden gems.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Cappadocia North Tour with Lunch and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through the wonders of Cappadocia with Travelxploria's expert team, ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Your adventure begins at the Goreme Open Air Museum, a hidden valley adorned with rock-cut churches and intricate frescoes dating back to the 10th-12th centuries. Here, our experienced tour guide will bring history to life, sharing stories of monastic life and Christian heritage. Next, marvel at Uçhisar Castle, the highest rock formation in the region, where our guide will explain the fascinating geological processes that shaped this landscape.

Delve deep into history as you explore Özkonak Underground City, one of Cappadocia’s most well-preserved subterranean settlements, with our best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth and insightful experience. Witness the surreal rock formations of Devrent Valley, also known as Imagination Valley, where nature’s artistry has created shapes resembling camels, owls, and even hands!

Continue to Avanos, where a live pottery demonstration showcases centuries-old craftsmanship, giving you a hands-on experience of this Cappadocian tradition. Finally, immerse yourself in the romantic ambiance of Love Valley, known for its breathtaking panoramic views. With Travelxploria’s seamless services, including comfortable transportation, guided tours, and expert insights, this day promises to be a perfect blend of history, nature, and culture.
