Relax and enjoy the final moments of your adventure, knowing that every detail of your journey has been handled with utmost care. Upon arrival in Istanbul, our team remains at your service, ensuring a smooth transition for your homebound flight. Reflect on the breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and unforgettable experiences you’ve gathered along the way. With Travelxploria’s signature hospitality and seamless pick-up and drop-off services, you depart Turkey with cherished memories and the promise of another extraordinary journey in the future. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again.

packages.overview: Embark on a magical Turkish journey with Travelxploria at the helm: upon arrival in Istanbul, our friendly representative ensures a seamless private transfer to your hotel, setting the tone for effortless exploration. Dive into the city’s storied past on a small-group Old City tour—marvel at Hagia Sophia, the Blue Mosque, and the bustling Grand Bazaar, all topped off with a delightful Turkish lunch. Then, escape the urban bustle on the Princess Islands—cycle shaded pine paths, savor fresh seafood by the shore, and breathe in the Aegean breeze before returning to Istanbul’s historic heart. After a leisurely morning of shopping and leisure, we ferry you to the skies for Cappadocia: upon landing, a shuttle whisks you to your cave-hotel haven. Spend a full day uncovering Cappadocia’s otherworldly landscapes on a guided North Tour—wander through Göreme’s fairy-chimney valleys, explore ancient rock-cut churches, and enjoy a hearty regional lunch. Finally, Travelxploria sees you off with a smooth shuttle to the airport, leaving you with sun-drenched memories of Turkey’s timeless wonders.

packages.overview: Experience the best of Turkey with Travelxploria’s seamless Istanbul & Cappadocia escape. Touch down in Istanbul and let our private transfer whisk you to your city-center hotel for a restful first night. On day two, journey through the city’s storied heart on a small-group Old City tour—marvel at Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque, lose yourself in the Grand Bazaar’s kaleidoscope of colors, and savor a delicious Turkish lunch. Day three offers the perfect blend of leisure and adventure: spend the morning shopping or simply soaking in Istanbul’s vibrant café culture before a private transfer to the airport and a short flight to Cappadocia. A shuttle will greet you at arrival, delivering you straight to your cave-hotel retreat. Wake up to otherworldly landscapes on day four with a full-day North Cappadocia tour—wander through Göreme’s fairy-chimney valleys, explore ancient rock-cut churches, and enjoy a hearty local lunch. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a smooth shuttle back to the airport for your flight to Istanbul and home, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Turkey’s magical contrasts.

Harbiye, an IHG Hotel/1741851025207-Crowne Plaza Istanbul - Harbiye, an IHG Hotel 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Istanbul Old City Tour with Lunch and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through Istanbul’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Begin your adventure at the Hippodrome of Constantinople, once the heart of Byzantine social life. Admire remarkable historical treasures, including the Obelisk from Egypt, the Serpentine Column from Delphi, and the German Fountain of Wilhelm II, while your Travelxploria guide shares captivating stories of their significance.

Next, marvel at the Blue Mosque, a masterpiece with six majestic minarets gracing Istanbul’s skyline. Continue to the Topkapi Palace (additional fee), the opulent residence of Ottoman sultans, where you’ll explore its dazzling treasury, imperial collections, and exquisite Oriental porcelain. If Topkapi Palace is closed on your visit, you’ll discover the fascinating Nakkas Cistern instead.

Step into the breathtaking Hagia Sophia Mosque (additional fee), an architectural marvel that has witnessed centuries of Byzantine and Ottoman rule. Be enthralled by its massive dome and intricate mosaics as your Travelxploria guide brings its storied past to life.

Conclude your tour at the Grand Bazaar, one of the world’s oldest and largest covered markets. With over 3,000 vibrant shops, explore an array of carpets, jewelry, ceramics, and leather goods, while soaking in the enchanting aroma of spices, dried fruits, and Turkish Delights.

With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off services, your journey through Istanbul will be both enriching and effortless, leaving you with cherished memories of this historic city.

and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through the wonders of Cappadocia with Travelxploria's expert team, ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Your adventure begins at the Goreme Open Air Museum, a hidden valley adorned with rock-cut churches and intricate frescoes dating back to the 10th-12th centuries. Here, our experienced tour guide will bring history to life, sharing stories of monastic life and Christian heritage. Next, marvel at Uçhisar Castle, the highest rock formation in the region, where our guide will explain the fascinating geological processes that shaped this landscape.

Delve deep into history as you explore Özkonak Underground City, one of Cappadocia’s most well-preserved subterranean settlements, with our best on-ground support staff ensuring a smooth and insightful experience. Witness the surreal rock formations of Devrent Valley, also known as Imagination Valley, where nature’s artistry has created shapes resembling camels, owls, and even hands!

Continue to Avanos, where a live pottery demonstration showcases centuries-old craftsmanship, giving you a hands-on experience of this Cappadocian tradition. Finally, immerse yourself in the romantic ambiance of Love Valley, known for its breathtaking panoramic views. With Travelxploria’s seamless services, including comfortable transportation, guided tours, and expert insights, this day promises to be a perfect blend of history, nature, and culture.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell & Departure","day_summary":"

As your incredible journey through Turkey comes to an end, Travelxploria’s representative and experienced tour guide ensure a seamless departure experience. Our best on-ground support staff will assist you with a hassle-free shuttle transfer from your hotel to the airport, making sure you catch your suitable flight to Istanbul with ease. Relax and enjoy the final moments of your adventure, knowing that every detail of your journey has been handled with utmost care. Upon arrival in Istanbul, our team remains at your service, ensuring a smooth transition for your homebound flight. Reflect on the breathtaking landscapes, rich history, and unforgettable experiences you’ve gathered along the way. With Travelxploria’s signature hospitality and seamless pick-up and drop-off services, you depart Turkey with cherished memories and the promise of another extraordinary journey in the future. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again.

  • Farewell Istanbul – Free time before airport transfer for homebound flight.

Continue to the Topkapi Palace (additional fee), the opulent residence of Ottoman sultans, where you’ll explore its dazzling treasury, imperial collections, and exquisite Oriental porcelain. If Topkapi Palace is closed on your visit, you’ll discover the fascinating Nakkas Cistern instead.

Step into the breathtaking Hagia Sophia Mosque (additional fee), an architectural marvel that has witnessed centuries of Byzantine and Ottoman rule. Be enthralled by its massive dome and intricate mosaics as your Travelxploria guide brings its storied past to life.

With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off services, your journey through Istanbul will be both enriching and effortless, leaving you with cherished memories of this historic city.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Night Dinner Bosphorus Cruise Tour","day_summary":"

Set sail on a mesmerizing Bosphorus Dinner Cruise with Travelxploria’s exceptional service, offering breathtaking views of Istanbul’s illuminated skyline. Glide along the iconic waterway on a luxurious yacht while indulging in a delightful dinner and witnessing spectacular live entertainment. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide by your side and the best on-ground support staff, every moment is seamlessly curated for an unforgettable experience.

Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off in a comfortable, air-conditioned van, or choose to meet directly at the port. Savor a welcome drink, including Turkish coffee, tea, or unlimited soft drinks, with an option for unlimited alcoholic beverages. Select from a standard or VIP meal, featuring appetizers like seasonal salads and hot starters, followed by delicious main courses such as grilled meats, fresh seasonal fish, or a vegetarian delight. Conclude your meal with a decadent Turkish dessert.

Immerse yourself in an evening of live entertainment, including mesmerizing whirling dervishes, traditional Turkish folk dances, Latin flamenco, Sirtaki, and belly dancing, all set against the backdrop of the stunning Bosphorus. As the yacht sails past landmarks like Dolmabahçe Palace, Galata Tower, and Maiden's Tower, let our Travelxploria tour guide enrich your journey with fascinating historical insights.

Capture the beauty of Ortaköy Mosque, Beylerbeyi Palace, and the Bosphorus and Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridges, all illuminated against the night sky. To enhance your experience, access a mobile audio guide app for in-depth details about the landmarks you pass. With Travelxploria’s dedicated team, every aspect of your evening is flawlessly arranged, ensuring a magical and luxurious night on the Bosphorus.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Shopping & Leisure","day_summary":"

Enjoy a leisurely day in Istanbul, where you can explore the city’s vibrant markets, luxury shopping districts, and hidden gems at your own pace. With Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, your day is seamlessly planned for comfort and convenience. Whether you prefer wandering through the Grand Bazaar’s historic alleys, indulging in designer brands at Istinye Park, or discovering unique handicrafts in Arasta Bazaar, our representative will assist you in making the most of your shopping experience.

Need recommendations? Our expert team is happy to guide you to the best spots for authentic Turkish carpets, jewelry, and exquisite local souvenirs. Enjoy smooth, hassle-free pick-up and drop-off from your hotel, allowing you to unwind after a day of retail therapy. As the sun sets, relax at a charming café or indulge in a delightful Turkish meal before retreating to your hotel for another magical night in Istanbul.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Bursa Cable Car Uludag Tour with Lunch and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on a mesmerizing day trip from Istanbul to Bursa with Travelxploria, where our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff ensure a seamless and enriching experience. Discover the first Ottoman capital’s rich history, indulge in the sweet delights of a Turkish delight factory, and marvel at the breathtaking landscapes of Uludağ Mountain, with an optional chairlift ride for panoramic views.

Your journey begins between 08:00 and 09:15 AM, as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth hotel pick-up in Istanbul. Travel via the Osmangazi Bridge or Ferry, with an optional thrilling ATV – Quad Safari stop in Yalova.

Upon arrival in Bursa, savor the unique flavors of a Turkish delight factory, visit the historic 630-year-old Ancient Tree in Inkaya, and explore a Natural Homemade Jam Preserved House.

Enjoy a delicious lunch of mixed grilled dishes before heading to Uludağ Mountain, Turkey’s premier ski resort. Take in the stunning scenery, explore at your leisure, and opt for an exhilarating chairlift ride to the peak. If conditions permit, descend via the cable car to downtown Bursa for even more spectacular views. (Note: No refunds if the cable car is closed due to weather conditions.)

In Bursa, immerse yourself in history with guided visits to the Green Mosque, Green Tomb, and Silk House, where our Travelxploria expert guide brings these landmarks to life.

As the day concludes, relax on the return journey to Istanbul, where our dedicated Travelxploria team ensures your safe and comfortable drop-off, making this an unforgettable journey filled with culture, adventure, and seamless experiences.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Princess Island Tour with Lunch and Coordinator","day_summary":"

Experience the serene beauty of Büyükada, the largest of Turkey’s Princes’ Islands, on this immersive 9-hour excursion with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching journey.

Your adventure begins with a comfortable pick-up from your hotel in an air-conditioned coach, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a hassle-free transfer to the port. As you cruise across the Sea of Marmara, watch Istanbul’s breathtaking skyline fade into the distance, passing by iconic landmarks such as Topkapi Palace and the picturesque Maiden’s Tower, famously featured in the James Bond film The World Is Not Enough.

Upon docking at Büyükada and Kınalı, take a leisurely stroll through the island’s charming streets, where time seems to slow down. With no cars allowed, the best way to explore is by bike (not included) or simply unwind on the pristine beaches. As you wander, admire the stunning Ottoman-era wooden mansions, a testament to the island’s rich architectural heritage.

During your boat ride, your Travelxploria tour guide will unravel the island’s fascinating history, from its days as an exile destination for royalty and statesmen to its monastic significance during the Byzantine-Christian period. If you’d like to connect with nature, our guide will even provide simits (sesame bread) to feed the ever-present seagulls.

Savor a delicious lunch on board during summer or at a cozy island restaurant in winter if the weather demands it. Enjoy the rest of your day at leisure, whether by exploring local markets, relaxing by the shore, or indulging in an optional visit to gift and leather shops.

As the day winds down, board your return ferry to Istanbul, reminiscing about the peaceful island retreat. Upon arrival, Travelxploria’s seamless drop-off service ensures you are comfortably transferred back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of your Büyükada escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell Istanbul","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey through Istanbul comes to an end, take some time to soak in the last moments of this magnificent city. Whether you wish to enjoy a quiet morning coffee overlooking the Bosphorus, pick up some last-minute souvenirs, or simply reflect on the incredible experiences you've had, Travelxploria ensures that your departure is as seamless as your arrival.

With our experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, every detail of your farewell is handled with care. When the time comes, our dedicated Travelxploria representative will provide a private transfer to IST/SAW Airport, ensuring a stress-free journey to your homebound flight. As you bid Istanbul farewell, take with you not just memories of its stunning landmarks and rich history, but also the warmth of its culture and hospitality. Until next time, safe travels!

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Istanbul","to":"Istanbul Sabiha Gokcen International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

Taksim/1741851288704-The Elysium Taksim 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":" Istanbul Old City Tour with Lunch and Guide","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable journey through Istanbul’s most iconic landmarks with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience.

Begin your adventure at the Hippodrome of Constantinople, once the heart of Byzantine social life. Admire remarkable historical treasures, including the Obelisk from Egypt, the Serpentine Column from Delphi, and the German Fountain of Wilhelm II, while your Travelxploria guide shares captivating stories of their significance.

Next, marvel at the Blue Mosque, a masterpiece with six majestic minarets gracing Istanbul’s skyline. Continue to the Topkapi Palace (additional fee), the opulent residence of Ottoman sultans, where you’ll explore its dazzling treasury, imperial collections, and exquisite Oriental porcelain. If Topkapi Palace is closed on your visit, you’ll discover the fascinating Nakkas Cistern instead.

Step into the breathtaking Hagia Sophia Mosque (additional fee), an architectural marvel that has witnessed centuries of Byzantine and Ottoman rule. Be enthralled by its massive dome and intricate mosaics as your Travelxploria guide brings its storied past to life.

Conclude your tour at the Grand Bazaar, one of the world’s oldest and largest covered markets. With over 3,000 vibrant shops, explore an array of carpets, jewelry, ceramics, and leather goods, while soaking in the enchanting aroma of spices, dried fruits, and Turkish Delights.

With Travelxploria’s seamless pick-up and drop-off services, your journey through Istanbul will be both enriching and effortless, leaving you with cherished memories of this historic city.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full Day Prince Islands Tour with Lunch and Coordinator","day_summary":"

Experience the serene beauty of Büyükada, the largest of Turkey’s Princes’ Islands, on this immersive 9-hour excursion with Travelxploria’s expert representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff, ensuring a seamless and enriching journey.

Your adventure begins with a comfortable pick-up from your hotel in an air-conditioned coach, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a hassle-free transfer to the port. As you cruise across the Sea of Marmara, watch Istanbul’s breathtaking skyline fade into the distance, passing by iconic landmarks such as Topkapi Palace and the picturesque Maiden’s Tower, famously featured in the James Bond film The World Is Not Enough.

Upon docking at Büyükada and Kınalı, take a leisurely stroll through the island’s charming streets, where time seems to slow down. With no cars allowed, the best way to explore is by bike (not included) or simply unwind on the pristine beaches. As you wander, admire the stunning Ottoman-era wooden mansions, a testament to the island’s rich architectural heritage.

During your boat ride, your Travelxploria tour guide will unravel the island’s fascinating history, from its days as an exile destination for royalty and statesmen to its monastic significance during the Byzantine-Christian period. If you’d like to connect with nature, our guide will even provide simits (sesame bread) to feed the ever-present seagulls.

Savor a delicious lunch on board during summer or at a cozy island restaurant in winter if the weather demands it. Enjoy the rest of your day at leisure, whether by exploring local markets, relaxing by the shore, or indulging in an optional visit to gift and leather shops.

As the day winds down, board your return ferry to Istanbul, reminiscing about the peaceful island retreat. Upon arrival, Travelxploria’s seamless drop-off service ensures you are comfortably transferred back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of your Büyükada escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Shopping & Leisure","day_summary":"

Enjoy a leisurely day in Istanbul, where you can explore the city’s vibrant markets, luxury shopping districts, and hidden gems at your own pace. With Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide and best on-ground support staff, your day is seamlessly planned for comfort and convenience. Whether you prefer wandering through the Grand Bazaar’s historic alleys, indulging in designer brands at Istinye Park, or discovering unique handicrafts in Arasta Bazaar, our representative will assist you in making the most of your shopping experience.

Need recommendations? Our expert team is happy to guide you to the best spots for authentic Turkish carpets, jewelry, and exquisite local souvenirs. Enjoy smooth, hassle-free pick-up and drop-off from your hotel, allowing you to unwind after a day of retail therapy. As the sun sets, relax at a charming café or indulge in a delightful Turkish meal before retreating to your hotel for another magical night in Istanbul.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell to Istanbul","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey in Istanbul comes to an end, enjoy some free time to soak in the city's final moments. Whether it’s a leisurely breakfast with a view, a last-minute stroll through the bustling streets, or picking up keepsakes from local markets, make the most of your remaining hours.

At the designated time, Travelxploria’s representative and best on-ground support staff will ensure a smooth and comfortable private transfer to IST/SAW Airport. With our experienced tour guide assisting you every step of the way, rest assured that your departure is hassle-free. Reflect on the cherished memories of your Bosphorus cruise, vibrant bazaars, and cultural landmarks, carrying home the essence of Istanbul’s beauty and charm.

Safe travels, and we at Travelxploria look forward to welcoming you on your next adventure.

packages.overview: From the moment you touch down at Istanbul’s IST or SAW airport, Travelxploria’s dedicated team is there to welcome you with a seamless private transfer to your boutique hotel—allowing you to settle in and breathe in the city’s magic from the very first sunset. On day two, our knowledgeable guides lead a small-group heritage tour through the awe-inspiring Hagia Sophia, the ethereal Blue Mosque, and the storied chambers of Topkapı Palace, punctuated by a sumptuous lunch of traditional Turkish specialties. Day three unfolds on the tranquil Prince Islands, where Travelxploria’s coordinator ensures you glide from ferry to phaeton in effortless style, discovering pine-shaded lanes, Victorian wooden villas, and seaside cafés at your leisure. On your final morning, enjoy insider tips for last-minute explorations—perhaps a stroll through the Spice Bazaar or a rooftop çay—before our private transfer whisks you back to the airport, leaving you with a heart full of Istanbul’s timeless stories and Travelxploria’s promise of a journey flawlessly crafted just for you.

Set sail on a mesmerizing Bosphorus Dinner Cruise with Travelxploria’s exceptional service, offering breathtaking views of Istanbul’s illuminated skyline. Glide along the iconic waterway on a luxurious yacht while indulging in a delightful dinner and witnessing spectacular live entertainment. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide by your side and the best on-ground support staff, every moment is seamlessly curated for an unforgettable experience.

Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off in a comfortable, air-conditioned van, or choose to meet directly at the port. Savor a welcome drink, including Turkish coffee, tea, or unlimited soft drinks, with an option for unlimited alcoholic beverages. Select from a standard or VIP meal, featuring appetizers like seasonal salads and hot starters, followed by delicious main courses such as grilled meats, fresh seasonal fish, or a vegetarian delight. Conclude your meal with a decadent Turkish dessert.

Immerse yourself in an evening of live entertainment, including mesmerizing whirling dervishes, traditional Turkish folk dances, Latin flamenco, Sirtaki, and belly dancing, all set against the backdrop of the stunning Bosphorus. As the yacht sails past landmarks like Dolmabahçe Palace, Galata Tower, and Maiden's Tower, let our Travelxploria tour guide enrich your journey with fascinating historical insights.

Capture the beauty of Ortaköy Mosque, Beylerbeyi Palace, and the Bosphorus and Fatih Sultan Mehmet Bridges, all illuminated against the night sky. To enhance your experience, access a mobile audio guide app for in-depth details about the landmarks you pass. With Travelxploria’s dedicated team, every aspect of your evening is flawlessly arranged, ensuring a magical and luxurious night on the Bosphorus.

packages.overview:
• Croatia: Home to beautiful beaches along the Adriatic coast, historic cities like Dubrovnik and Split, and the stunning Plitvice Lakes National Park. Croatia blends medieval architecture with spectacular coastal views and a rich cultural heritage.

  • Serbia: A blend of traditional and modern, Serbia offers historical landmarks such as Belgrade’s Kalemegdan Fortress, vibrant nightlife, and beautiful landscapes like Tara National Park. The country's culinary delights and lively festivals make it a unique destination.

  • Bosnia & Herzegovina: Sarajevo is known for its Ottoman, Austro-Hungarian, and Yugoslav history, with sites like the Sarajevo Tunnel and Baščaršija market. The picturesque town of Mostar is famous for the iconic Stari Most (Old Bridge) spanning the Neretva River.

  • Montenegro: A hidden gem with a coastline dotted with charming towns like Kotor and Budva, stunning beaches, and mountains. Montenegro is ideal for lovers of outdoor adventures, offering hiking, boating, and breathtaking views along the Bay of Kotor.

  • Albania: Known for its untouched nature, pristine beaches, and ancient ruins, Albania offers a more off-the-beaten-path experience. Explore UNESCO World Heritage sites like Gjirokastër, visit the beaches of the Albanian Riviera, and discover the charming city of Berat.

  • Kosovo: A relatively new country, Kosovo boasts a unique blend of history, culture, and hospitality. Visit the UNESCO-listed Decani Monastery, the vibrant capital of Pristina, and the tranquil town of Peja surrounded by the Rugova Mountains.

  • North Macedonia: Home to picturesque Lake Ohrid, North Macedonia offers historical gems like the ancient city of Ohrid, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and a blend of Slavic, Ottoman, and Byzantine influences in its architecture and culture.

  • Bulgaria: Known for its rich history, Bulgaria offers diverse landscapes from Black Sea beaches to mountain ranges. Explore Sofia’s historical sites, the ancient rock-hewn churches of Ivanovo, and the UNESCO-listed Rila Monastery.

  • Greece: Though often considered part of the Mediterranean, Greece’s northern regions, such as Thessaloniki and Meteora, showcase the diverse heritage and stunning landscapes of the Balkans. Visit ancient ruins, picturesque villages, and vibrant cities.

[{"city":"Zagreb","country":"Croatia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Croatia/Zagreb/1741009120185-istockphoto-1339679815-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Croatia/Zagreb/1741009120255-istockphoto-546182488-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Croatia/Zagreb/1741009120325-istockphoto-481956848-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Landing in Zagreb","day_summary":"

Arrival in Zagreb. We’ll be ready to transfer you to your hotel. Our guide will join us with the group from Slovenia around lunchtime. In the afternoon, at around 04:00 p.m. (time may vary), we’ll embark on a panoramic tour with a local guide (included), giving us the opportunity to admire the city´s two hills, the upper town, and the new neighborhoods of Croatia’s capital. Dinner will be included.

We’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Dubrovnik with a local guide in the morning. We will undoubtedly be in one of the most beautiful cities in Europe, perched on a cliff, surrounded by walls and kissed by the Adriatic Sea. Its intact historic center is a jewel of world architectural heritage. We’ll have the opportunity to enjoy a stunning view of the city from a scenic viewpoint along the road. The tour includes tickets to the Franciscan Monastery, home to the oldest pharmacy in Europe, and the Assumption Cathedral. We’ll also take a boat trip to Lokrum, a small island just 15 minutes away that is home to the ruins of an eleventh-century Benedictine monastery, a popular setting for the series Game of Thrones. Afterward, you’ll have free time to explore at your leisure before returning to the hotel in the late afternoon. Dinner will be included.

Today’s journey will take us through the stunning landscapes of the Balkan Mountains. In the Rose Valley, we’ll visit Kazanlak, where admission is included to see the replica of the Thracian Tomb of Kazanlak, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. We’ll also learn about the local production of rose-based products. Amidst the mountains, we’ll stop at the Shipka Memorial Church, a memorial to the Russo-Turkish War. We’ll then explore Etar, a charming village and ethnographic museum. After lunch (included), we’ll travel to Arbanasi, an ancient trading city known for its fortress-like houses, where we’ll visit the Nativity Church (admission included). Our day will end in Veliko Tarnovo, Bulgaria’s former capital, renowned for its picturesque medieval center beside its canyon.

packages.package_name: Hidden Gems of Bulgaria and the Balkans
packages.overview:
Bulgaria – The Jewel of the Balkans

  • Sofia: The capital city blending Roman ruins, Orthodox churches, and modern life.

  • Rila Monastery: A UNESCO World Heritage Site and Bulgaria’s most famous monastery.

  • Plovdiv: One of Europe’s oldest cities, home to a well-preserved Roman amphitheater and charming Old Town.

  • Veliko Tarnovo: The medieval capital of Bulgaria, featuring Tsarevets Fortress.

  • Black Sea Coast: Golden Sands & Sunny Beach offer stunning beaches and vibrant nightlife.

  • Bansko & Pirin Mountains: A top ski and hiking destination with breathtaking landscapes.

  • Bulgarian Cuisine: Try banitsa (cheese pastry), shopska salad, and rakia (fruit brandy).

The Balkans – A Mosaic of Cultures & Landscapes

  • Serbia: Explore Belgrade’s historic Kalemegdan Fortress and lively nightlife.

  • Romania: Visit Bucharest’s Palace of Parliament and Transylvania’s Dracula Castle.

  • North Macedonia: Discover the stunning Ohrid Lake and the capital, Skopje.

  • Montenegro: Enjoy the scenic Bay of Kotor and the picturesque beaches of Budva.

  • Albania: Experience Tirana’s vibrant streets and the pristine beaches of the Albanian Riviera.

Join Travelxploria for an unforgettable day, beginning with a guided sightseeing tour of Sarajevo, known as the \"Jerusalem of Europe\" for its rich religious diversity. Explore the old town’s Ottoman influence, including a 500-year-old mosque and a stunning fountain. Our experienced Travelxploria guide will lead you through this captivating city, where mosques, churches, and synagogues coexist harmoniously. Afterward, we’ll head to Mostar, a city of breathtaking beauty, where the iconic stone bridge divides Orthodox, Muslim, and Catholic communities. You’ll have time for lunch and a leisurely stroll through this enchanting historic center. Discover the beauty of Dubrovnik with Travelxploria on a panoramic tour of one of Europe's most stunning cities. Perched on a cliff and surrounded by ancient walls, Dubrovnik is a true architectural gem, and our expert local guide will bring its history to life. Enjoy breathtaking views from a scenic viewpoint and explore the Franciscan Monastery, home to Europe's oldest pharmacy, and the magnificent Assumption Cathedral. Our journey continues with a boat trip to Lokrum Island, where you'll visit the ruins of an eleventh-century Benedictine monastery, a popular filming location for Game of Thrones. After the tour, you’ll have free time to explore the city’s charming streets at your leisure. Throughout your day, our Travelxploria representative and on-the-ground support team will ensure everything runs smoothly, from seamless transfers to providing assistance whenever you need it. In the evening, we’ll return to the hotel for a relaxing dinner. Let Travelxploria make your Dubrovnik experience truly unforgettable.

Throughout the day, our Travelxploria representative ensures smooth transfers, giving you the freedom to enjoy the sights without the stress. Join Travelxploria on a day filled with captivating history and breathtaking landscapes, as we explore the vibrant capital of Albania, Tirana. Our experienced tour guide will lead you through the city’s stunning mosques, the Clock Tower, and the grand ministries on a panoramic tour. Afterward, we’ll head inland, passing through picturesque villages and Albania’s dramatic mountain scenery. As we approach Lake Ohrid, one of Europe’s oldest and most beautiful lakes, we’ll stop for lunch in Struga, a charming lakeside town. We’ll then cross into Macedonia, where our Travelxploria representative will ensure smooth border procedures and hassle-free transfers. In Ohrid, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, you’ll have time to explore the historic Plaosnik Monastery and the ancient university founded in the 9th century. With seamless pick-ups and drop-offs, and personalized attention from our expert guide and support staff, we’ll ensure your journey through the Balkans is unforgettable. Dinner will be included to round off the day.

Today, embark on an incredible journey with Travelxploria, where history and natural beauty come together seamlessly. We’ll begin by traveling through Macedonia, passing the historic city of Bitola, known as the \"City of Consuls.\" After crossing the border into Greece, our expert tour guide will lead you through the northern region, rich in Slavic and Ottoman influences, with stunning rugged landscapes. We’ll stop in Kastoria, famous for its 100 churches and medieval streets, where you’ll have time to enjoy lunch by the lakeside. In the afternoon, we’ll continue to Kalabaka, home to the awe-inspiring Meteora rock formations. Here, we’ll visit one of its famous monasteries (admission included), perched high on the cliffs, offering both spiritual history and breathtaking views. Throughout the day, our Travelxploria representative and on-the-ground support staff will ensure smooth pick-ups, drop-offs, and personalized care, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the experience. Dinner will be included, capping off a remarkable day.

Bidding farewell to the Balkans marks the end of a mesmerizing journey through a region rich in cultural diversity, breathtaking landscapes, and deep-rooted history, where ancient fortresses and vibrant old towns tell tales of empires past, scenic coastlines along the Adriatic and rugged mountain ranges leave lasting impressions, and the warmth of local hospitality lingers just as fondly as the taste of traditional dishes and regional wines, as you reflect on moments spent exploring charming cities like Dubrovnik, Kotor, Sarajevo, and Belgrade, cruising through lakes and valleys, wandering cobbled streets and bustling markets, and embracing a tapestry of languages, traditions, and unforgettable encounters—this bittersweet goodbye is more than just the end of a trip; it’s a heartfelt departure from a land that stirs the soul and invites you to return, carrying with you memories woven from history, nature, and the spirit of the Balkan people.

{"title":"Bhaskar Chakraborty","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

We went for a girls trip to Thailand on 18th April with TravelXploria first time.From day one I talked to Mr. Sanjib for our trip and he did the best customised trip for us as per our requirement & choices. The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! Got all the info through my WhatsApp regarding cab timing, airport pickup n all. Only two things I didn't like . Hotel Ao nang timber house in krabi . Service is poor , no security guard n no receptionist after 8.00 pm &no basic toiletries .Another thing is the driver in bangkok was soo rude n rigid specially non cooperative. Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

overview:
Hidden Charms & Timeless Tales: Your Signature Eastern Europe Journey with Travelxploria

A land where castles rise from misty valleys, cobbled lanes whisper stories of empires past, and forested peaks cradle sleepy villages—Eastern Europe unfolds like a secret waiting to be discovered. With Travelxploria as your Best Travel Agency, trusted Best Tour Operator, and leading Best International Tour Operator, your journey through this enchanting region is not just a tour—it’s a soulful escape through cultures, traditions, and timeless beauty. Choose from our Best Package of Eastern Europe, discover joy with the Best Family package, or indulge in togetherness with our Best Honeymoon Planner.

Wander through the fairy-tale charm of Prague, where Gothic spires and medieval bridges reflect on the Vltava River. Travelxploria takes you beyond the postcards—into secret courtyards, centuries-old taverns, and evening cruises beneath the twinkling cityscape, all arranged flawlessly by your Best Tour Operator.

In Budapest, grandeur and grit blend beneath the glow of thermal baths and neo-baroque domes. Our Best Package of Eastern Europe includes a sunset sail on the Danube, where couples enjoy champagne toasts against the Parliament’s illuminated silhouette, and families delight in folklore nights curated by Travelxploria’s expert team.

Step into Vienna, where elegance is a daily affair—from imperial palaces and waltzing ballrooms to the sweet scent of apple strudel wafting through café-lined boulevards. Travelxploria, your Best International Tour Operator, ensures a deep dive into Austria’s cultural core, whether you're visiting art-filled museums, attending private concerts, or strolling through blooming palace gardens.

In the postcard-perfect towns of Cesky Krumlov, Bratislava, and Krakow, past and present intermingle. Travelxploria’s Best Family package turns each city into a living storybook—children marvel at towering castles, while adults sip local wines in Renaissance courtyards. In Krakow, let Travelxploria guide you through the echoing beauty of Wawel Castle and the poignant depths of history preserved in its quiet corners.

Couples in search of intimacy will fall for Lake Bled in Slovenia, where a lone church rises from an emerald lake, framed by the Julian Alps. Our Best Honeymoon Planner arranges romantic rowboat rides, mountaintop dinners, and stays in charming lakeside villas that feel worlds away.

Explore Transylvania in Romania, where legends of Dracula fade into the peaceful rhythm of Saxon villages and pine-scented trails. With Travelxploria’s handpicked guides, even the most remote regions become accessible, safe, and spellbinding.

Whether you’re chasing cobblestone dreams, rediscovering forgotten histories, or simply sipping coffee in a quiet European square, Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, Best Tour Operator, and Best International Tour Operator—curates each detail to perfection.

Book our Best Package of Eastern Europe, discover joy with the Best Family package, or ignite romance with our Best Honeymoon Planner. From Prague’s golden glow to Slovenia’s alpine peace, Eastern Europe is your storybook—and Travelxploria writes it with wonder on every page.
